title: B.Sc. (Hons.) Biological Sciences - 3 years
content: B.Sc. (Hons.) Biological Sciences is a full time, 3 years undergraduate degree course which deals with animal biology, plant biology and chemistry. This course offers a comprehensive understanding of the life forms from cellular to the molecular level. The course essentially revolves around the comprehensive study of Animal Biodiversity, plant Biodiversity, Physiology, Biochemistry, Cell and Molecular Biology, Gene Technology & Human Welfare, Ecology, Evolutionary & Developmental Biology and Environment Biology. 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology from a recognized Board with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list 01 Foundational and Advanced Knowledge: To provide students with a comprehensive understanding of biological systems at molecular, cellular, organismal, and ecological levels, preparing them for advanced studies and research in life sciences. 02 Skill Development and Innovation: To equip students with practical skills, scientific reasoning, and technological competencies necessary for solving real-world biological problems and contributing to innovations in health, agriculture, environment, and biotechnology sectors. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 These young minds will be ignited to understand the world of biological science concepts through application based learning. 02 03 The students will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing, continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organization. 01 Disciplinary Knowledge and Problem Analysing: The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the concepts of life sciences through application-based learning and to apply the knowledge in analyzing the problems related to various fields of biological sciences for their solutions and enhances overall development and also equip with advanced techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude with problem solving skills. 02 Formulation and Design: The graduates will be trained to handle the advanced techniques of biological sciences to formulate the solutions of variety of problems related to the real life and will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing and continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organizations. 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology from a recognized Board with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list
